> [!NOTE] > Currently processing new changes in this PR. This may take a few minutes, please wait... > >
> ⚙️ Run configuration > > **Configuration used**: Organization UI > > **Review profile**: CHILL > > **Plan**: Pro > > **Run ID**: `8286acae-6975-4588-b94f-167854b84583` > >

> 📥 Commits > > Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between b1cbba000b4661fe6291e7d93dea78c23d72a2f5 and a676157a2fb7f747171a3a3444778a87b6f7ea12. > >
> >
> 📒 Files selected for processing (1) > > * `action.yml` > >
> > ```ascii > _______________________________________ > < CI/CD: Carrots In / Defects Canceled. > > --------------------------------------- > \ > \ \ > \ /\ > ( ) > .( o ). > ```
📝 Walkthrough ## ウォークスルー ワークフロー呼び出しを再利用可能な GitHub Action に置き換え、README／実装計画／スキル文書を追加・更新。ingest ロジックの一部（型と main）が内部化され、INBOX_BRANCH を環境変数で制御可能にしました。 ## 変更内容 |コホート / ファイル|概要| |---|---| |**ワークフロー呼び出し更新**
` .github/workflows/review-ingest.yml`|Bun と git 設定ステップを削除し、`uses: ./` による再利用可能アクション呼び出しへ置換。入力（github-token、bot-allowlist、inbox-branch）を追加。| |**再利用可能アクション定義**
`action.yml`|新規追加。inputs 定義と composite 実行シーケンス（Bun セットアップ、依存インストール、git identity、ingest 実行）を含むアクションを追加。| |**README 更新**
`README.md`|「Planned V1」を「Current Status」に置換。採用方法例（Use In Another Repository）、前提、リポジトリ構成、Next Phase を追記。| |**実装計画更新**
`docs/implementation-plan.md`|V1 完了の現状、Reusable Action トラック、Phase 6（配布・導入）等を追加。/check-inbox スキル参照を文書化。| |**スキル文書追加**
`.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md`, `docs/skills/check-inbox.md`|/check-inbox オペレーターワークフロー（前提、手順、CLI コマンド、失敗時対応、出力契約）を新規追加。| |**ingest ロジック整理**
`src/actions/ingest.ts`|`IngestResult` を非エクスポート化、`main` を非エクスポート化して内部化、`emptyResult()` 追加。INBOX_BRANCH を環境変数で受け取るよう変更。| ## Sequence Diagram(s) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Workflow as Caller Workflow participant Action as Reusable Action participant Runner as Action Runner participant Ingest as Ingest Script participant GH as GitHub API / Repo Workflow->>Action: 呼び出し (inputs: github-token, bot-allowlist, inbox-branch) Action->>Runner: セットアップ (Bun, install deps, git identity) Runner->>Ingest: 実行: bun run src/actions/ingest.ts (env: INBOX_BRANCH, BOT_ALLOWLIST, GITHUB_TOKEN) Ingest->>GH: GitHub イベント取得 / PR 情報参照 Ingest->>GH: 新規/更新された inbox JSONL/MD を `inbox-branch` に書き込み GH-->>Ingest: 書き込み確認 Ingest-->>Runner: 結果レポート (added, unchanged, updated) Runner-->>Action: 実行終了ステータス Action-->>Workflow: 結果返却 ``` ## 推定コードレビュー工数 🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~20 分 ## 詩 > 🐰 小さな足で跳ねてきたよ > アクションの道をつなぐよ > ドキュメントに明かりともして > 内部を整え、外へ手を伸ばす > 一緒に跳べば、次の野原へ
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 2 | ❌ 1 ### ❌ Failed checks (1 warning) | Check name | Status | Explanation | Resolution | | :----------------: | :--------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Docstring Coverage | ⚠️ Warning | Docstring coverage is 0.00% which is insufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |
✅ Passed checks (2 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :---------------: | :------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | PRのタイトルはアクションを再利用可能にする主要な変更を正確に反映しており、action.ymlの追加とingest.tsの変更を適切に要約しています。 |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `feat/reusable-action-adoption`
📝 Coding Plan - [ ] Generate coding plan for human review comments
--- Comment `@coderabbitai help` to get the list of available commands and usage tips.

🧹 Nitpick comments (1)
.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md (1)
`22-25`: **文の繰り返しを検討してください。** 3つの連続した文が同じ "Require" で始まっています。可読性を向上させるため、一部の文を言い換えることを検討できます。
♻️ 可読性向上のための提案 ```diff -- Run from the repository root. -- Require `gh` auth, `git`, and `~/.bun/bin/bun`. -- Require an open PR for the current branch, or a user-provided PR number. -- Require Yamabiko-lite source in the repo (`src/cli/main.ts`). +- Run from the repository root. +- Ensure `gh` auth, `git`, and `~/.bun/bin/bun` are available. +- Verify an open PR exists for the current branch, or obtain a user-provided PR number. +- Confirm Yamabiko-lite source is present in the repo (`src/cli/main.ts`). ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In @.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md around lines 22 - 25, The three consecutive lines all starting with "Require" in the checklist are repetitive; update the wording to improve readability by either introducing a single heading like "Requirements:" and listing the three items as sub-bullets, or vary the verbs for each item (e.g., "Run from the repository root.", "Ensure gh authentication and that git and ~/.bun/bin/bun are available.", "Have an open PR for the current branch or supply a PR number.", "Include the Yamabiko-lite source (src/cli/main.ts) in the repo"). Keep the same checklist items but change the phrasing so only one line uses "Require" (or none) to avoid repetition. ```
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. Nitpick comments: In @.claude/commands/check-inbox/SKILL.md: - Around line 22-25: The three consecutive lines all starting with "Require" in the checklist are repetitive; update the wording to improve readability by either introducing a single heading like "Requirements:" and listing the three items as sub-bullets, or vary the verbs for each item (e.g., "Run from the repository root.", "Ensure gh authentication and that git and ~/.bun/bin/bun are available.", "Have an open PR for the current branch or supply a PR number.", "Include the Yamabiko-lite source (src/cli/main.ts) in the repo"). Keep the same checklist items but change the phrasing so only one line uses "Require" (or none) to avoid repetition. ```
---
